violations.text: Observed front milk/water lowboy cooler gasket was not in good repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/24/2024

The outside dumpster is not covered. The sliding door on the dumpster was missing. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 01/24/2024
